info.title: DeepLynx Nexus API
info.description: DeepLynx Nexus API for managing organizational data and relationships. Endpoints are organized by Organization-level (/api/organizations/{organizationId}) and Project-level (/api/projects/{projectId}) scopes.

get.description:
This endpoint requires authentication. The Next.js proxy ensures the user
is authenticated before forwarding the request here.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: CSRF protection token

200.description: Redirects to callback URL with authorization code

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

post.description:
This endpoint does not require user authentication. It uses client credentials
(client_id and client_secret) to authenticate the OAuth application.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The authorization code received from the authorize endpoint

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: The same CSRF state used in the authorize request

parameters.name: expiration
parameters.description: (Optional) token expiration time in minutes (default: 480)

200.description: JSON response with access token or error

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: The ID of the organization to which the class's project belongs

parameters.name: projectIds
parameters.description: (Optional)An array of project IDs within the organization to filter by

parameters.name: hideArchived
parameters.description: Flag indicating whether to hide archived classes from the result (Default true)

200.description: List of class response DTOs

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

get.summary: Get an Edge by Origin and Destination

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: The ID of the organization to which the project belongs

parameters.name: projectId

parameters.name: destinationId
parameters.description: The destination ID of the edge to retrieve

parameters.name: hideArchived
parameters.description: Flag indicating whether to hide archived edges from the result (Default true)

200.description: The edge associated with the given origin and destination

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token
